# Security Scan Reports

This directory stores archived outputs from security scanning tools.

## Reports generated by `make security-audit` / `make owasp-scan` / `make vuln-audit`

| File | Tool | Target |
|------|------|--------|
| `owasp-zap-report.html` | OWASP ZAP | HTTP endpoints (local/staging) |
| `owasp-zap-report.json` | OWASP ZAP | HTTP endpoints (machine-readable) |
| `gitleaks-report.json` | gitleaks | Secrets in source tree |
| `govulncheck-report.txt` | govulncheck | Go module CVEs |
| `pip-audit-report.json` | pip-audit | Python dependency CVEs |

All report files are excluded from git (see `.gitignore`).  
Archive copies should be stored in the project's secure document store.
